title: Override record
description: A single authorized override of generated code. See orchestrator-architecture.md §9.3 for the reconciliation protocol.

files.description: Paths under the component repo's generated directory that this override modifies.

task_correlation_id.description: Task-level correlation ID (FEAT-YYYY-NNNN/TNN) of the task that required the override.

tracking_issue.description: GitHub issue that retires the override when closed, in `owner/repo#number` form.

expiry_condition.description: Human-readable condition under which this override is retired. Typically `on closure of <tracking_issue>` but may be broader.

timestamp.description: When the override was authorized (ISO 8601 with timezone).
